creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can this PR be closed? It's been fixed:

fernape@beastie:~/Downloads$ tar xvjf uspace_rtapi_app.tar.bz2 
x uspace_rtapi_app/
x uspace_rtapi_app/uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.cpp
x uspace_rtapi_app/uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.sh
fernape@beastie:~/Downloads$ cd uspace_rtapi_app
fernape@beastie:~/Downloads/uspace_rtapi_app$ ls
uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.cpp  uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.sh
fernape@beastie:~/Downloads/uspace_rtapi_app$ sh uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.sh 
fernape@beastie:~/Downloads/uspace_rtapi_app$ ls
uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.cpp  uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.o    uspace_rtapi_app-4fc6ab.sh
fernape@beastie:~/Downloads/uspace_rtapi_app$ clang --version
FreeBSD clang version 4.0.0 (tags/RELEASE_400/final 297347) (based on LLVM 4.0.0)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd11.1
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
fernape@beastie:~/Downloads/uspace_rtapi_app$
